summary: PTY cleanup on app close: dual-layer (frontend beforeunload + Rust RunEvent::Exit) kills active CLI process trees, preventing 'session already in use' errors on restart. Merged ptyCleanup.ts into ptyProcess.ts per simplifier. Fixed stale PID on natural exit per reviewer. Added 9 unit tests. Simplified Rust borrow pattern.

Proved 24 entries (12 FEATURES all PASS, 12 ARCHITECTURE 11 PASS 1 DRIFT fixed). Synced CLAUDE.md: added ptyProcess.ts, paths.ts, settingsSchema.ts to lib; ConfigManager, ThinkingPanel, ModalOverlay to components; added Ctrl+comma and F2 shortcuts. Folder audit: 4 stray .ps1 files + bash.exe.stackdump in root (not gitignored). Hooks: tsc PostToolUse hook already present, no changes needed.

Terminal UX: vertical button bar replacing overlay buttons (TR-07), scroll-to-last-message (TR-08), Ctrl+wheel page scroll (TR-09), Alt+digit PTY blocking (KB-10), scroll desync fix (PT-08). Extracted PROMPT_MARKER/BOTTOM_TOLERANCE constants per simplifier. Added aria-labels per reviewer. No blocking bugs found.

Clean pass on terminal UX changes. No blocking bugs (2nd review). Applied 2 simplifications: removed scrollToLastRef indirection (stable useCallback), replaced IIFE token badge with plain variable. 200/200 tests, 0 tsc errors. Constants verified consistent.

ConfigManager redesign: 5 tabs (Settings/CLAUDE.md/Hooks/Plugins/Agents), ThreePaneEditor 3-column scope layout (User/Project/Local color-coded), ModalOverlay shared wrapper, absorbed HooksManager. Fixed focus-reclaim stale selectors (.hooks-overlay/.config-overlay -> .modal-overlay) and PluginsPane data-clobbering (read-modify-write merge). 9 doc tags added (MO-01, CM-11-17, RC-12). 5 old CM entries marked stale for next /j. 200 tests pass, 0 TS errors.
